\begin{figure}[!t]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=\columnwidth]{figure/fig_community_graph.png}
\caption{Top-10 SkillGraph communities (out of 216 total; Louvain modularity $Q{=}0.892$).
Node size is proportional to community size (number of tools);
arrow weight reflects inter-community transition probability.
Communities align with API categories (NMI\,=\,0.695 vs.\ RapidAPI taxonomy):
domain-specific tools co-cluster naturally (e.g.\ \emph{Finance}
and \emph{Currency \& Crypto} exchange strongly, reflecting
multi-step trading workflows), validating that SkillGraph encodes
semantically coherent execution dependencies.}
\label{fig:community}
\end{figure}
